creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
On my everyday computer with 14.0-CURRENT: 

1) I have the symptom in <https://github.com/imsnif/bandwhich/issues/254>: 

    `Err` value: AddrParseError(Ip)', src/os/lsof_utils.rs:110:31`

– and then (after working around by e.g. shrinking the font): 

2) all tables are blank. 

Screen recording: <https://photos.app.goo.gl/UszZBLVPD9pumTCb7>
